title: Outlaw Girl
writer: Franco Brusati, Mario Camerini, Ennio De Concini
actors: Amedeo Nazzari, Silvana Mangano, Umberto Spadaro
plot: Beppe Musolino is falsely accused of murder. He is tried, found guilty, and imprisoned. Unexpectedly he escapes from prison and to survive he starts living like an outlaw brigand. He falls in love with village girl Mara, who helps...
